## Project Checklist

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Goal: Async Python PostgreSQL load generator with modular workloads, CLI, YAML/JSON config, metrics (throughput & latency percentiles), and basic tests.
  - Assumptions: Python >= 3.11, user supplies a PostgreSQL instance & credentials via DSN/ENV. Minimal external deps.

- [x] Scaffold the Project (added pyproject, source package, config example, tests)
- [x] Customize the Project (basic metrics, sample workload, CLI added)
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project (deps installed, tests pass)
- [x] Create and Run Task (added tasks.json for lint + tests)
- [ ] Launch the Project (deferred until user provides DSN)

Progress notes will be appended inline as steps complete.
